title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above

✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

title: Logitech M305 Gold Tendrils Wireless Mouse
description: This wireless mouse features 1000 dpi optical technology for responsive cursor control and 2.4GHz wireless technology for a reliable connection.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Great.

reviews.title: Love it!!!
reviews.text: Love this mouse!! No more cord for my cat to chew. Beautiful graphic and sleek design. SOOO easy to use! Wish I had gotten this a long time ago!!

description: LEGENDARY SOUND FROM A LEGENDARY PRODUCT The Klipsch ProMedia 2.1 was the first three-piece computer system to be THX certified, and its introduction singlehandedly raised the bar on what is defined as exceptional sound from CDs, MP3's and streaming radio.  Many have tried to copy its groundbreaking performance, but the ProMedia 2.1 still reigns supreme over anything near its price range. EXCLUSIVE HORN-LOADED TECHNOLOGY Klipsch Micro Tractrix horns make a major contribution to the Promedia 2.1's amazing proficiency.  Their highly efficient design reproduces more sound from every watt of power, controlling the dispersion of that sound and sending it straight to your ears for clarity and lifelike impact no other system can duplicate. CLEAN BASS OUTPUT AT ALL VOLUME LEVELS The two-way satellites' 3" midbass drivers blend perfectly with the Promedia 2.1's  solid, 6.5" side-firing, ported subwoofer for full bandwidth bass response you can actually feel.  With a separate subwoofer volume control, you can adjust for the best bass for what you're listening to. PERFORMANCE THAT CREATES FLEXIBILITY With its plug and play setup and convenient 3.5mm input, the Promedia 2.1 can double from anything from a TV sound enhancer to a 2.1 Home Theater system.  Its 200 watts of dynamic system power can fill even a larger room with sound.  The headphone jack allows for private listening when desired. Specifications Amplifier Power Peak Power: 200 Watts total syst...
features: Turns desktops into high-performance entertainment centers
Maximizes digital technologies such as CDs, MP3 downloads and streaming radio
Delivers amazingly crisp and clear response
Subwoofer generates deep, authoritative lows
Compatible with other devices via a headphone jack and miniplug input

reviews.title: These are great sounding computer speakers
reviews.text:
I have the Klipsch Pro Media Thx 2.1. These are great sounding computer speakers. They best the Bose Companion II which sound terrible in comparison. the Bose sound shallow and weak. These speakers have 3 1/2 inch long throw woofers for the midrange, and a real subwoofer for the lows. They are great sounding for what they are and the best computer speakers to my knowledge in the $200 or below genre.

However, they need to be tweaked. The subwoofer is slightly heavy (although an adjustment is on your speakers) and the highs are slightly bright like other Klipsch speakers, and the midrange is slightly recessed. Simply set your computer system from Windows at 70% output roughly, then pull up iTunes (if you use it) or another equalizer, and set the low bass from about 65K down about 3db below average, put the midrange from about 125K on up to about three 3DB higher than normal, then set the 1K at zero, and above that from 2K on up about 3db below zero. You can adjust that a little to make a curve

These speakers are great. I went with refurbished myself at a little over half price. Enjoy! They are great.

P.S. I am an audiophile who has a good ear and an extremely good stereo system. These do not equal that, but sound great for what they are and better than all others for $200 or less and close to the $400 plus systems.

reviews.title: Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound
reviews.text: I'm not clear what the differences are between this model and the other identically labelled model from other sellers that sell for less money. You shouldn't pay more than $120-$135 for these from what I can tell after shopping around. I bought mine in "like-new" condition for $99 with Prime free shipping and I'm ecstatic about the sound quality. Subwoofer is boomy and the sat speakers are bright. Typical Klipsch sound. Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound. I compared these to the Logitech at $105-$120. I own a pair of those too. I'm a fan of Logitech. Make that, I used to be a fan. Going to go with Klipsch if I ever have need for more speakers. These sound great. You won't be disappointed if you like the "Klipsch sound."

reviews.title: The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or ...
reviews.text: First experience with Klipsch speakers and I am thoroughly impressed! Wasn't expecting the amount of impact from the subwoofer (my previous pc came with a factory 5.1 setup and fall flat compared to these). The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or listening to music/watching videos. I was worried that a 2.1 setup would leave something to be desired vs a 5.1 setup, but I'm glad I made the jump!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect just as described

reviews.title: No better computer speaker out there
reviews.text:
There is simply no better set of computer speakers out there. The subwoofer rivals those home theater setups as well. I have this in my office connected to a Mac Mini which I often use for iTunes and watching movies, and recording to Garageband.

I have never cranked the volume 100%, it's incredibly loud at 65%. Bass is very smooth and powerful.

I actually needed speakers for an outdoor wedding and actually brought these to the event, no one complained about not being able to hear the ceremony even 20 rows back.

If you can't afford a home theatre system, consider this 2.1 for your living room as well. This will surprise you.

reviews.title: Cheap and useless.
reviews.text: This mouse feels so cheap, it wasn’t even worth giving a review but I wanted to warn others to not get this mouse. It’s so flimsy and made so cheaply, I didn’t waste anymore time with it so I am returning.

reviews.title: Flawless Bluetooth connectivity with Mac
reviews.text: My Logitech M310 (been using them for 10-15 years) could not connect properly with my USB-C/Thunderbolt MacBookPro, using their USB dongle, thru a USB adapter. Scroll wheel would NOT work, and Logitech tech support said they would not update drivers. 'Don't use an adapter.' But they aren't aware that new Macs don't have old-school USB ports? Anyone else have this problem?! Anyway... this Seenda connects directly with Bluetooth, and connects instantly. If it sleeps (after a few hours?) it wakes and re-connects with one click, in less than a second. I charged the battery when I bought it a few weeks ago, and forgot that I might need to charge it again one day. Still going. Downsides: it is much smaller and lighter than I am used to (the M310 is easily twice as thick/tall) so I am getting used to that. Took awhile to find the right DPI/resolution/speed (and the button to change that is in a precarious, easy-to-hit-by-mistake position. Overall a great recommend.

reviews.title: squeaks when scrolling - not for small hands

How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

reviews.title: Hey it works great HIGHLY RECOMMEND
reviews.text:
It works does random motion immediately recognized by my dell laptop workstation
I’m not monitored by my boss so can’t give insight to that consideration. IT KEEPS MY SCREEN open so I don’t have to keep logging in
Wish the jiggle button had a light to tell it’s active HOWEVER perhaps this is a good thing (it immediately jiggles so I know it’s working) no light no one knows around me it’s on
I’d highly recommend this

reviews.title: Great Wireless Mouse and Jiggler
reviews.text: This mouse is the perfect size and weight, moves well and clicks quietly. I love the jigglier functionality; you just press the button built into the mouse and it keep the mouse cursor moving on the screen. It keeps my window open and Office teams active. I should have gotten a mouse like this long ago; it allows you additional freedom at work when you need to be away from your desk for a while. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Very good idea
reviews.text: Very good idea to have this jiggler built in, other similar products need to have an additional equipment, and put mouse on it for moving, not as convenient as this one. But sometimes this product is not stable, after a couple of hours working, I found the mouse stopped moving, I checked and found the battery light was off due to unknown reason, and after I reset the battery, the mouse moved again, and such kinds of issue happened several times. Therefore, I can only gave 4 stars review. But anyway I like this cute tool.

reviews.title: Keep screensavers from activating or keep from being logged off for no activity!
reviews.text:
A very handy, take it with you mouse that will keep pretty much anything from timing out due to lack of activity. When you need to step away for a few minutes and not have anything you are working on, just press the button on top to activate the jiggler and keep the mouse pointer gently moving.
I have only had this for a week or so and it has already proved it's worth. When my screen saver kicks off any process I have running slows way down. When I am rendering media this is a major pain, or I should say "used to be a major pain".
The dongle for USB connectivity stores in the mouse itself so you can carry the mouse and never have to worry about losing the dongle. It also has an on/off switch to save battery life.
A nice piece of gear, I suggest this for anyone that doesn't want to time out again.

reviews.title: Quiet and Functional
reviews.text:
I have been searching for a product like this for a long time! I work remotely most days and have to rely on connecting through a VPN connection. The connection automatically disconnects after a certain time frame, so this jiggler function is great! I can click the button to activate and leave the computer.
The setup on this mouse is so simple. I plugged in the USB and the mouse worked right away.
My favorite feature that was unexpected was how quiet the mouse is. I wasn’t use to not being able to hear a click. Such a nice product!

The little usb part that needs to plug into your laptop to talk to the mouse, is plugged into the under side of the mouse, simply pull out and stick into the laptop, switch the button on the mouse (on bottom) to on, and as long as charged up, it’s ready to go. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!

title: Logitech M585 Multi-Device Wireless Mouse – Control and Move Text/Images/Files Between 2 Windows and Apple Mac Computers and Laptops with Bluetooth or USB, 2 Year Battery Life, Graphite
description: Talk about a game changer! With Logitech FLOW, M585 Multi-Device has the almost magical capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers and copy-paste from one to the other – even if you're using a PC and a Mac. It certainly beats sending yourself emails. M585 also comes with a host of other features to improve your productivity, your way: fast and easy scrolling through long web pages; five programmable buttons, including two handy thumb buttons; a 2-year battery life** and a curved, domed shape that supports your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play. Dual connectivity (Bluetooth or 2.4 GHz Logitech Unifying). System Requirements: Required: Bluetooth low energy technologyWindows 10 or later Windows 8Mac OS X 10.10 or lateChrome OSAndroid 5.0 or later|Required: Available USB portWindows 10 or later Windows 8 Windows 7Mac OS X 10.05 or laterChrome OS|Internet connection for software download USB port.

DUAL CONNECTIVITY - Use with up to three Windows or Mac computers and laptops via included Unifying receiver or Bluetooth Smart wireless technology
LONG BATTERY LIFE- The Logitech M585 just keeps going, with 2 years of power on a single AA battery
ULTRA-PRECISE SCROLLING- Micro-precision wheel packs more grooves per millimeter to make scrolling through long webpages faster and easier

reviews.title: Excellent travel size and 6 month long battery life!
reviews.text:
Updated 1 year later(May 3, 2020)

Down grading from 5 stars to 3 stars because it turns out there might be a bug in the mouse that once you pair it with 2 different computers over bluetooth, you cannot reset the mouse to use the wireless dongle. There is also no support on the Logitech website - try searching their website for the manual for this mouse, it's absolutely missing. You'll see an FAQ section and some various sections on tech spec, but no setup guide or manual!

*********

If you're tried of replacing batteries, this mouse is for you! I'm impressed by how long a single AA battery lasts in this mouse. I haven't had to replace the battery since getting it 6 months ago even with daily use. The two modes is nice since it lets me connect this mouse to two computers! The bluetooth is strong and connects well to my MacBook Pro, while the included radio frequency receiver is plugged into a iMac and I can switch between computers with a. simple button click.

reviews.title: Great travel mouse!
reviews.text: Love the feel of it. Easy to connect. Small enough to use for travel yet big enough to where it doesn’t hurt to use ergonomically.

reviews.title: WOW! Seamless movement from one computer to the other!
reviews.text:
This device synched to both computers quickly. Download the 'Logi Options' software on both, then enable 'Flow'
Move the mouse off the bottom of one screen & it appears at the top of the other laptop.
Copy a file on computer one, switch to the computer two, right-click->paste. You have copied the file took computer one to computer two.
The mouse itself is legit comfortable, precise asks smooth.
Add 'Flow' and it is also revolutionary.
Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice mouse for Mac Pro using Big Sur OS
reviews.text: I was looking for a mouse for my MacPro computer.  It's got 2 buttons on the mouse that I wanted to setup as volume up, and volume down.  But there is no instructions on how to do this, and I can't find any.  I'm using the mouse as a standard mouse with scroll for web pages.  Works perfect for that.

reviews.title: Nice and quiet
reviews.text:
Nice, quiet mouse at a great price. It's on the smaller size, just what I needed for carrying in the computer bag. I have long fingers, but not necessarily large hands, and this fits perfectly for me. The scroll wheel is nice and smooth (and also quiet). You can feel some tactile "knurling" when you scroll, so it's not baby's-butt-smooth, but it's not like scrolling over a circular-saw blade either.

Using the USB dongle, the mouse is very responsive. The Bluetooth connection seemed a little laggy to me. No stars off unless it does the same when I test it on another PC.

I do not intend to install the Logitech Options software so I cannot speak to the usefulness of Flow or reassigning buttons.

Pros
- USB and Bluetooth connectivity
- Can use with up to two devices.
- 7 buttons: L, R, Center, Center-Left, Center-Right, Back, Forward. Eight if you include the PC selector button.
- Very quiet left/right click buttons
- Nearly quiet center click and back/forward buttons
- Uses one AA battery (preferred over non-replaceable battery)
- Battery life advertised at 2 years.
- Has an on/off switch on the bottom

Cons
- Possible laggy response using Bluetooth. I need to test on another PC to be sure.

Other consideration:
- The USB dongle storage is behind the battery door. If you frequently remove the dongle from the PC, this might be a concern for you (it's not a problem for me).

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

Plug and Play: Reliable wireless connection using a plug-and-play USB dongle, wide working range of a radius up to 32 feet, no additional driver needed.

Comfort Shape for Medium or Large Grip: (Dimensions:11.8cm/4.6in*7.5cm/3in*5.8cm/2.2in)The ergo mouse can help you work better and faster with a perfectly-crafted full-size shape designed for the large palm (even over 7.5- inch palm).

Ultra-Quiet Clicks & Well-Placed Thumb Controls: No more annoying click noise to create better, quieter environment for you and those around you. Create and work more intuitively and effortlessly with the ideally placed front and back buttons.

Premium Long-Lasting Battery Life: Only one AA battery needed, it can work up to 16 months thanks to auto-sleep power saving mode and on/off switch button. Note: The battery life may vary based on use and computing conditions.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: I was looking for something a bit angled because my wrist was feeling uncomfortable but I didn't want an extreme twist to the side. I've always used Logitech mice but this has been working great. I wish it had a couple more buttons on it so I could set a button to heal and one to my 4th skill but otherwise it's just what I needed. It goes to sleep when you don't use it and wakes up when you click so I don't have to turn it off. And it's blurple, the best color.

reviews.title: Perfect fit
reviews.text: I have a small hand and it fit great. Works amazing.

reviews.title: Love it - very comfortable
reviews.text: Bought to replace the mouse I lost on vacation. Best purchase. I like the pink as my boys will not steal it.

reviews.title: Stopped working after 2 days
reviews.text: Don’t waste your time or money on this remote. It feels great & is a cute color, but stopped working after a few days.

reviews.title: Not the best
reviews.text: I wanted so much to love this mouse, sadly after a few months it began to fail. The scrolling feature only works randomly, most of the time when you click, you have to click twice for it to work. Used brand new batteries but it didn't make a difference. Disappointed that I wasted money, will stick with a name brand.

title: Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor FHD 1920 x 1080 Computer Monitor, 75 Hertz, 5 MS, Dual Monitor, Wireless Keyboard and Wireless Mouse, VESA, VGA and HDMI Monitor, Basic Monitor and Gaming Monitor – 2 Pack
features: High-Quality Visuals - The Packard Bell airFrame 24 is equipped with a 1920 x 1080p resolution, this monitor delivers crisp and clear visuals that are great for both gaming and office use.

Fast Refresh Rate and Response Time - With a 75 hertz refresh rate and a 5 ms response time, the Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor provides a smooth and seamless experience, making it perfect for gamers and anyone who needs a fast and responsive display.
VESA Mount Compatible – The airFrame 24 is compatible with VESA mounts, which allows you to easily mount it on a wall or a monitor arm for a more ergonomic setup.
Adjustable Stand - The stand is adjustable, with a 5 degree forward tilt and a 15 degree backward tilt, making it easy to find the most comfortable viewing angle.

Wide Viewing Angle - The airFrame 24 has a 178 degree viewing angle, which ensures that the display looks great from almost any angle, making it perfect for students who need to share their screen with others. Plus, it's compatible with PC, Xbox, and PS5, making it a versatile option for any setup.

reviews.title: Great price for this two pack
reviews.text: I was really impressed with how well these monitors were packed for shipment. They arrived quickly and were better quality than expected.

reviews.title: Value of the product
reviews.text: It was nice to get two 24" monitors for the price of one. It greatly helps by increasing the amount of screen I have to work with and the picture quality is phenomenal.

reviews.title: great monitor for the price
reviews.text: A great value and more importantly an excellent monitor.  I like the narrow edge border as it provides more space than my previous monitor without sacrificing screen space.  I like the clarity, no dead pixels, and less blue light issues.  very satisfied.

reviews.title: Easy to view and use.
reviews.text: I'm enjoying my first extended screen and found it quite intuitive. The colors are bright and the 24" size is great for a smaller setup. The screen can tip up and down but it does not rotate. No problem for me.

reviews.title: I couldn’t be happier perfect picture!
reviews.text: Great color and clarity!!!!

title: KawaiiMouse [ Optical 2.4G Wireless Mouse ] Cute Don't Mess Pig
description: Optical 2.4G Wireless Mouse with nano receiver.

reviews.title: Nice Gift....
reviews.text: Gave this to a co-worker for a Christmas gift.  She has a thing for pigs and loved it.  She reports back that it works well.

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse
description: Anti-Slip tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat resistant pads / anti sweat paste for Logitech G pro wireless mouse
features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: It works for G305
reviews.text: I recently purchased Logitech G305, But it felt slippery. Though this product was intended for GPW, it worked well for the G305.

title: HP 15.6" HD Touch Screen Laptop Bundle , AMD A12-9720P Quad core processor 2.7 GHz, 8GB DDR4, 1TB HDD, DVD, WiFi, Webcam, Windows 10, Gray, Wireless Mouse and Backpack Included.

With the latest AMD Quad-Core A12-9720P processor, AMD Radeon R7 Graphics, 8GB DDR4 Memory, and 1TB Hard Drive, this laptop delivers the reliable performance you need to work and play.
features: Brand New in box. The product ships with all relevant accessories

reviews.title: Laptop is not like new it is new the box had never been opened, Thank You So Much
reviews.text: I'm so happy with this purchase the items are exactly as described

reviews.title: Sucks, Slow, Terrible, Missing pieces.
reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: so far its a great buy. I like it

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: TECKNET Bluetooth Wireless Mouse, 3200 DPI Computer Mouse, 24-Month Battery Life and 6 Adjustable DPI Levels, 6 Buttons Compatible with Ipad Pro/Laptop/Surface Pro/Windows Computer/Chromebook-Red
features: 6 DPI and 6 Buttons: TECKNET bluetooth mouse has 3200/2400/2000/1600/1200/800DPI. Six efficient buttons and five adjustable DPI level that allow you to freely control the mouse speed. Connects directly to Bluetooth-enabled device laptop computer or PC without the need for a receiver.

TruWave technology. the accuracy of TruWave means you'll enjoy smoother tracking on almost any surface. With its wireless Bluetooth connection and TruWave technology, it works almost anywhere, from a café to a park bench. You can even use the TECKNET Bluetooth mouse on smooth material surfaces.

Ergonomic Design: The ergonomic design and soft rubber grip perfect to fit your hand for a comfortable grip while reducing wrist fatigue caused by long working hours. The compact size makes it easy to take with you whether you use your computer at home, at work or anywhere else.

Comfortable and Durable: TECKNET computer mice is made of skin-friendly, super durable wireless mouse with perfect performance on 10,000,000 clicks keystroke test! If you have problems with product, please contact us to solve it for you.
Long Battery Life: TECKNET bluetooth mouse can up to 24-month battery Life. It takes only 2 AA battery but NOT INCLUDED.

Wide Compatibility: TECKNET mouse compatible with Windows (2000, 2003, XP, VISTA, Win7, Win8, Win8.1, Win 10, Win 11, etc)Suitable for desktop, laptop, PC, MacBook, Chromebook and other devices.
